languages.original_text: {n}Over his shoulder, Eogunn tosses the words:{/n} "No, Nuncius, I was not trying to hide anything from the Rogue Trader. I only reasoned that the squabbles of Tech-Priests would scarcely be of interest to {mf|him|her}."

languages.text: {n}Эоганн бросает за плечо:{/n} "Нет, Нунциус, я не пытался ничего скрыть от Вольного Торговца. Лишь думал, что дрязги техножрецов {mf|ему|ей} будут не слишком интересны".

{n}Over his shoulder, Eogunn tosses the words:{/n} "No, Nuncius, I was not trying to hide anything from the Rogue Trader. I only reasoned that the squabbles of Tech-Priests would scarcely be of interest to {mf|him|her}."
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн бросает за плечо:{/n} "Нет, Нунциус, я не пытался ничего скрыть от Вольного Торговца. Лишь думал, что дрязги техножрецов {mf|ему|ей} будут не слишком интересны".

traits.locale_text: {n}Over his shoulder, Eogunn tosses the words:{/n} "No, Nuncius, I was not trying to hide anything from the Rogue Trader. I only reasoned that the squabbles of Tech-Priests would scarcely be of interest to {mf|him|her}."

{n}Over his shoulder, Eogunn tosses the words:{/n} "No, Nuncius, I was not trying to hide anything from the Rogue Trader. I only reasoned that the squabbles of Tech-Priests would scarcely be of interest to {mf|him|her}."

{n}Over his shoulder, Eogunn tosses the words:{/n} "No, Nuncius, I was not trying to hide anything from the Rogue Trader. I only reasoned that the squabbles of Tech-Priests would scarcely be of interest to {mf|him|her}."

languages.text: {n}Por encima del hombro, Eogunn ladra:{/n} «No, Nuncius, no pretendía ocultarle nada a{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente. Solo he pensado que las discusiones de los tecnosacerdotes no le resultarían interesantes en absoluto».
languages.original_text: {n}Over his shoulder, Eogunn tosses the words:{/n} "No, Nuncius, I was not trying to hide anything from the Rogue Trader. I only reasoned that the squabbles of Tech-Priests would scarcely be of interest to {mf|him|her}."

traits.locale_text: {n}Por encima del hombro, Eogunn ladra:{/n} «No, Nuncius, no pretendía ocultarle nada a{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente. Solo he pensado que las discusiones de los tecnosacerdotes no le resultarían interesantes en absoluto».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡头也不回地抛出一句话：{/n}“不，努恩修斯，我并没有想对行商浪人隐瞒什么。我只是觉得，对于技术神甫之间的争执，舰长大人怕是没什么兴趣。”
languages.original_text: {n}Over his shoulder, Eogunn tosses the words:{/n} "No, Nuncius, I was not trying to hide anything from the Rogue Trader. I only reasoned that the squabbles of Tech-Priests would scarcely be of interest to {mf|him|her}."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡头也不回地抛出一句话：{/n}“不，努恩修斯，我并没有想对行商浪人隐瞒什么。我只是觉得，对于技术神甫之间的争执，舰长大人怕是没什么兴趣。”

languages.text: {n}Par-dessus son épaule, Eogunn explique :{/n} « Non, Nuncius, je ne cherchais pas à cacher quoi que ce soit {mf|au libre-marchand|à la libre-marchande}. Je pensais simplement que les bisbilles des technoprêtres ne lui seraient que de peu d'intérêt. »
languages.original_text: {n}Over his shoulder, Eogunn tosses the words:{/n} "No, Nuncius, I was not trying to hide anything from the Rogue Trader. I only reasoned that the squabbles of Tech-Priests would scarcely be of interest to {mf|him|her}."

traits.locale_text: {n}Par-dessus son épaule, Eogunn explique :{/n} « Non, Nuncius, je ne cherchais pas à cacher quoi que ce soit {mf|au libre-marchand|à la libre-marchande}. Je pensais simplement que les bisbilles des technoprêtres ne lui seraient que de peu d'intérêt. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn ruft über seine Schulter:{/n} "Nein, Nuncius, ich wollte nichts vor {mf|dem Freihändler|der Freihändlerin} verbergen. Ich habe lediglich angenommen, dass {mf|ihn|sie} das Gezanke von Techpriestern nicht interessieren wird."
languages.original_text: {n}Over his shoulder, Eogunn tosses the words:{/n} "No, Nuncius, I was not trying to hide anything from the Rogue Trader. I only reasoned that the squabbles of Tech-Priests would scarcely be of interest to {mf|him|her}."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn ruft über seine Schulter:{/n} "Nein, Nuncius, ich wollte nichts vor {mf|dem Freihändler|der Freihändlerin} verbergen. Ich habe lediglich angenommen, dass {mf|ihn|sie} das Gezanke von Techpriestern nicht interessieren wird."

languages.text: {n}肩越しに、エオグンが言葉を投げかける：{/n}「ローグ・トレーダーには何も隠すつもりはなかった。技術神官たちのいさかいなど、彼の関心事ではないだろうと思っただけだ」。
languages.original_text: {n}Over his shoulder, Eogunn tosses the words:{/n} "No, Nuncius, I was not trying to hide anything from the Rogue Trader. I only reasoned that the squabbles of Tech-Priests would scarcely be of interest to {mf|him|her}."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, kelimeleri omzunun üzerinden savuruyor.{/n} "Hayır Nuncius, Hür Tacir'den hiçbir şey saklamaya çalışmıyordum. Sadece Tekno Rahiplerin itiş kakışının onun pek ilgisini çekmeyeceğini düşündüm."
languages.original_text: {n}Over his shoulder, Eogunn tosses the words:{/n} "No, Nuncius, I was not trying to hide anything from the Rogue Trader. I only reasoned that the squabbles of Tech-Priests would scarcely be of interest to {mf|him|her}."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn, kelimeleri omzunun üzerinden savuruyor.{/n} "Hayır Nuncius, Hür Tacir'den hiçbir şey saklamaya çalışmıyordum. Sadece Tekno Rahiplerin itiş kakışının onun pek ilgisini çekmeyeceğini düşündüm."
